_publications._publicationTitle: Ex vivo to in vivo model of malignant peripheral nerve sheath tumors for precision oncology.

_contextSnippet: MN-2 tumor growth was slowed after trabectedin treatment (P < 0.0001), and the effect was greater with mirdametinib-alone treatment (P < 0.05)
details: Tumor growth was slowed after trabectedin treatment (P < 0.0001), with greater effect from mirdametinib-alone treatment (P < 0.05). Combination of trabectedin plus mirdametinib showed most growth impedance compared to either single agent alone
